metadata.instruction: Set DuckDuckGo as the default search engine on Chrome
metadata.context: I prefer a privacy-focused search engine and want to use DuckDuckGo by default.

l3.rationale: Win opened the Windows start/app window from the desktop context.

l4.rationale: Used the Windows app launcher to move to Google Chrome and launch it.

l5.rationale: Opens or switches into Chrome to begin changing the default search engine.

l3.rationale: Typing a character moved focus to the matching desktop/program list item.

l4.rationale: Used the Windows app launcher to move to Google Chrome and launch it.

l5.rationale: Opens or switches into Chrome to begin changing the default search engine.
